description: baseline — round 2 (from round 1 final: 1.61x SDPA)
BLOCK_Q=128 8 warps — register spills killed it
launch_bounds(128,4) — spill cost > occupancy gain
split K/V prefetch — wait stalls increased, no benefit
V preload in P*V — compiler already optimizes identically, no change
BLOCK_KV=128 launch_bounds(128,2) — occupancy drop 12→8 warps killed latency hiding
split-half softmax — extra scalar overhead cancelled wait reduction
BLOCK_KV=32 launch_bounds(128,4) — doubled iterations hurt more than occupancy gain
Q-in-smem — extra ldmatrix_x4 per kv_block hurt more than register savings helped
nc-outer/dc-inner fused mask+max — math_throttle 41→34% but wait 18→24%, net worse
prefetch after QK^T — barrier 6→3%, SM throughput 56→58%
P*V nc-outer/kc-inner + pre-packed P — compiler unrolls identically, no change
unconditional exp in softmax — removed 64 compare+select, 2.4% speedup
exp2f softmax — fold LOG2E into Q scale, save 34 MULs/iter
skip mask for unmasked KV blocks — 60+ fewer conditionals/iter
BLOCK_KV=96 — bank conflicts doubled (20K), occupancy likely dropped to 2 blocks
skip first-iter rescale — branch overhead outweighs 1-iteration savings
deferred sum reduction after P*V — compiler already reorders, no change
ldmatrix.x4 for K loads + revert asym buffering — fewer instructions per MMA pair
prefetch before QK^T — cp.async/ldmatrix contention during QK^T, 3% bench regression
split prefetch V-before-QKT K-after — extra commit overhead, 3% regression despite 79% fewer bank conflicts
BLOCK_Q=128 only — grid too small for primary config (256 blocks < 340 SMs*2), 35% SM utilization
dynamic BQ dispatch — BQ=128 when grid>=340 blocks, BQ=64 otherwise. N=4096: 2x faster (1.15x SDPA), D=128: 7x faster (1.00x SDPA)
